    The Menu

    Cuts Worth
    The House Call

    Every service runs on professional clippers, shears and a proper hot towel — the same tools and the same finish you'd get in the chair, delivered to your driveway.

    Signature Service

    Signature Fades

    Degradados de precisión

    Skin, drop, taper or burst — blended seamless from the skin up and finished sharp around the ears and neckline. The cut X Barber is known for, dialed to your shape.

    From $40 · Cut + beard combo available

    02

    Beard Sculpt & Lineup

    Perfilado de barba

    Shaped, edged and contoured to your jaw, then finished with a hot towel and a clean razor lineup.

    03

    Hair Art & Designs

    Diseños y figuras

    Freehand stars, letters, parts and patterns razored in clean. Bring a reference or let the barber freestyle it.

    04

    Kids' Cuts

    Cortes para niños

    Patient, friendly cuts for the little ones — fades, designs and first haircuts, right at home where they're comfortable.

    05

    Color & Gray Blending

    Color y cobertura de canas

    Soften the gray or go full silver. Natural blends and bold color, beard included, finished and styled.

    06

    Hot Towel Shave

    Afeitado con toalla caliente

    A traditional straight-razor shave with hot towels and finishing balm. Smooth, sharp and old-school.

    The Work

    Fresh From The Chair

    Real cuts, real clients — fades, beards, designs and transformations done on location across Miami.

    We Bring The Shop To You.

    Home, office, hotel or on set — you sit, we cut. No drive, no waiting room.

    786-555-0123
    The Barber

    Premium Cuts,
    Delivered.

    X Barber is a mobile barbershop built for people who don't have time to sit in a shop. The chair, the clippers, the hot towels and the finish all come to your door — fully equipped and ready to go wherever you are.

    From clean skin fades and sculpted beards to freehand designs, kids' cuts and full color transformations, every appointment gets the same precision and the same attention to detail you'd expect from a high-end shop.

    Bilingual, on time and booked around your schedule — seven days a week across Miami.

    "Looking sharp shouldn't cost you your whole afternoon. We bring the barbershop to you."

    — X Barber
    7
    Days a Week
    100%
    At Your Door
    How It Works

    Four Steps To Fresh

    01

    Book

    Call, text or send the form with your spot and preferred time.

    02

    We Roll Out

    Your barber arrives fully equipped — chair, clippers, towels and all.

    03

    You Sit, We Cut

    Relax at home while you get a clean, precise, shop-quality cut.

    04

    Look Sharp

    Pay easy — cash, Zelle or card — and book your next fresh-up.
